section_name: Notice to Appear Required: Certain Offenses
text:
(a) An officer shall issue a written notice to appear if:

(1) the offense charged is:

(A) speeding;

(B) the use of a wireless communication device under Section 545.4251 (Use of Portable Wireless Communication Device for Electronic Messaging; Offense) ; or

(C) a violation of the open container law, Section 49.031 (Possession of Alcoholic Beverage in Motor Vehicle) , Penal Code; and

(2) the person makes a written promise to appear in court as provided by Section 543.005 (Promise to Appear; Release) .

(b) If the person is a resident of or is operating a vehicle licensed in a state or country other than this state, Subsection (a) applies only as provided by Chapter 703 (Nonresident Violator Compact of 1977) .

(c) The offenses specified by Subsection (a) are the only offenses for which issuance of a written notice to appear is mandatory.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 543. Arrest & Prosecution of Violators
##### § 543.004 — Notice to Appear Required: Certain Offenses

(a) An officer shall issue a written notice to appear if:

    (1) the offense charged is:

        (A) speeding;

        (B) the use of a wireless communication device under Section 545.4251 (Use of Portable Wireless Communication Device for Electronic Messaging; Offense) ; or

        (C) a violation of the open container law, Section 49.031 (Possession of Alcoholic Beverage in Motor Vehicle) , Penal Code; and

    (2) the person makes a written promise to appear in court as provided by Section 543.005 (Promise to Appear; Release) .

(b) If the person is a resident of or is operating a vehicle licensed in a state or country other than this state, Subsection (a) applies only as provided by Chapter 703 (Nonresident Violator Compact of 1977) .

(c) The offenses specified by Subsection (a) are the only offenses for which issuance of a written notice to appear is mandatory.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 438 (H.B.62), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2017.*
